name: CalEthos, Inc.
summary: CalEthos, Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to seek, investigate and, acquire an interest in business opportunities in the California cannabis industry. Previously, it was involved in the acquisition, management, and holding of multi-family properties in the United States. The company was formerly known as RealSource Residential, Inc. changed its name to CalEthos, Inc. in December 2018. CalEthos, Inc. is based in Tustin, California. As of September 12, 2018, CalEthos, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of M1 Advisors, LLC.
